steps.title: Identify the compound interrogative structure
steps.content: The sentence asks two linked questions: “What are atmospheric rivers?” and “and how...” The second question contains a verb phrase that must follow interrogative word order rules.

steps.title: Apply the inversion rule
steps.content:
In interrogative sentences with auxiliary verbs, the auxiliary must come before the subject—”do they,” not “they do.” Additionally, since this is a question, it must end with a question mark, not a period. Choice C has both the correct word order and correct punctuation. The other choices fail on one or both counts.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
